rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §25.152, which governs school district limited public forum policies for student religious expression. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: To ensure that the school district does not discriminate against a student's publicly stated voluntary expression of a religious viewpoint, if any, and to eliminate any actual or perceived affirmative school sponsorship or attribution to the district of a student's expression of a religious viewpoint, if any, a school district shall adopt a policy
_note: Rule text concerns student speech/religious expression policy; proposed change concerns property tax exemption amount. No nexus between provisions.
